findings.description: @csrf_exempt disables Django's CSRF protection for this view. State-changing endpoints (POST/PUT/DELETE) without CSRF protection are vulnerable to cross-site request forgery. (Heuristic: review whether this exemption is intentional and safe.)
findings.recommendation: Remove @csrf_exempt and use Django's CSRF middleware. For REST APIs, use token-based auth (DRF SessionAuthentication or JWT) instead of exempting CSRF.
